description: Evals for the provision-golden-path dispatch + content. Content evals are run twice (with the skill loaded and without) to expose the value delta. Trigger evals validate the frontmatter description routes correctly; the val split is the ship gate (>= 0.5 on should-trigger, < 0.5 on should-not).

content_evals.prompt: Spin up an orders service for the storefront.
content_evals.with_skill_expected: Gathers name/region/owner/description, normalizes the name to zava-orders, shows a checkpoint of what will be created (repo, RG, OIDC, deploy) and that it provisions real Azure resources, then on approval files a `provision`-labeled issue in DevExpGbb/zava-agent-config, watches the run, verifies HTTP 200, and explains the guardrails.
content_evals.without_skill_expected: Hand-waves or proposes running raw az/gh commands by hand, with no governed front door, no OIDC story, and no live verification.
content_evals.value_delta: With the skill the request goes through the governed IssueOps path and is verified live; without it the agent improvises an ungoverned, secret-prone path.

content_evals.prompt: What did provisioning actually give me?
content_evals.with_skill_expected: Reads references/golden-path-anatomy.md and cites concrete guardrails: repo from zava-app-template, secretless GitHub-to-Azure OIDC with subject repo:DevExpGbb/<name>:environment:dev, Owner RBAC scoped to rg-<name>, the dev environment, repo variables, the first deploy to Azure Container Apps, and inherited APM audit + secure-baseline.
content_evals.without_skill_expected: Guesses at a generic CI/CD setup; likely omits the secretless-OIDC subject binding and the RG-scoped blast-radius detail.
content_evals.value_delta: With the skill the explanation is grounded and accurate to the engine; without it it is vague and may misstate the security model.

content_evals.with_skill_expected: Runs check-service-name.mjs, normalizes to zava-orders, explains the naming rule, and confirms before filing.
content_evals.without_skill_expected: May file or attempt a request with an invalid name and only discover the rejection after the workflow parses it.
content_evals.value_delta: With the skill invalid input is caught locally before any side effect; without it the failure surfaces late.

trigger_evals.query: provision a new orders service
I need a new microservice for payments
scaffold me a repo with CI already set up
bootstrap a project that deploys to Azure
spin up a new service on the golden path
where do new services come from here?
get me a deployable repo with OIDC to Azure
set me up a new app from the template
create a new component for the storefront
start a new service with security and a deploy pipeline already wired
deploy my latest changes to production
fix the failing CI pipeline on zava-orders
create an Azure storage account
review my pull request
open an issue about a login bug
modernize this Express 4 app to Express 5
what's the status of my running container app?
rotate the secret on my service
summarize this incident postmortem
add a new endpoint to the existing orders API
